evals.prompt: I need cert fingerprint for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-fingerprint skill for this certificate fingerprint request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects certificate-fingerprint for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_fingerprint_domain, cert_fingerprint_file.
Keeps the response focused on generating certificate fingerprints (SHA-256, SHA-1, MD5, public key SHA-256) for SSL pinning, verification, or tracking.

evals.prompt: Calculate the SHA-256 and SHA-1 fingerprints for the certificate served by example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-fingerprint skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-fingerprint instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
